introSection: K3 Roller Skater is a steel roller coaster at Plopsaland Belgium in Adinkerke-De Panne, West Flanders, Flemish Region, Belgium.

sections.title: History
sections.content: Opened in 1991, this was the first Vekoma Junior Coaster model to be installed. It had the now standard roller skate theme upon opening at the park. The ride would receive a theme based on the Flemish children's TV show Wizzy & Woppy, produced by Studio 100, when they bought the former Meli Park. It was one of the many changes the park would face in its transformation to Plopsaland. The ride was rethemed in 2019, receiving a new theme based on the Flemish girl band K3.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Pink track with green supports. The ride was originally painted yellow with green supports. It was repainted red with dark green supports for the 2009 season. It received its current colour scheme with the retheme in 2019.

fullText:
K3 Roller Skater is a steel roller coaster at Plopsaland Belgium in Adinkerke-De Panne, West Flanders, Flemish Region, Belgium.

Opened in 1991, this was the first Vekoma Junior Coaster model to be installed. It had the now standard roller skate theme upon opening at the park. The ride would receive a theme based on the Flemish children's TV show Wizzy & Woppy, produced by Studio 100, when they bought the former Meli Park. It was one of the many changes the park would face in its transformation to Plopsaland. The ride was rethemed in 2019, receiving a new theme based on the Flemish girl band K3.



Pink track with green supports. The ride was originally painted yellow with green supports. It was repainted red with dark green supports for the 2009 season. It received its current colour scheme with the retheme in 2019.
